files.purpose: Audit of mczaykowski.com (principal pattern). Site MRS 2.8.
Audit of stripe.com (platform-docs pattern) against synthetic mission set. Site MRS 2.3.
MRA v0.1 methodology — 5-phase rubric (Discover/Resolve/Internalize/Complete/Verify), scoring conventions, pattern split (principal vs platform-docs).
Synthesis of v0.1 findings across audited sites; headline conclusions and open methodology questions.
